name: Carrot Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Cake:
1. Mix oil and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until well combined.
2. Add eggs and beat until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Sift together flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt three times.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture and mix well.
5. Stir in carrots and nuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9 x 11-inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
8. Cool completely.
Frosting:
1. Cream together the softened cream cheese and butter in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, mixing until well blended.
3. Add vanilla and beat until smooth.
4. Frost the cooled cake once it has fully set.
